remaining_tasks.name: Build verification + CLAUDE.md sync obligations
steps: cd app/frontend/backoffice-app && npm run build (must pass — TypeScript + Vite)
Update docs/brain/02_Journal/CHANGELOG.md with all 3 commits + Phase D commit
Log relevant non-obvious changes in docs/brain/03_Architecture/QUIRKS.md (surface-main undefined token, KDS white ticket-paper intentional preservation)

decisions.decision: Keep dark tactical theme, enforce DESIGN.md as source of truth
decisions.rationale: User chose this explicitly over light Stripe/Shopify pivot

decisions.decision: Preserve white 'thermal-paper' ticket surfaces in KDS
decisions.rationale: Intentional skeuomorphic metaphor (printed kitchen ticket); not a drift from DESIGN.md

decisions.decision: Preserve QR code white card in OrderingPage payment modal
decisions.rationale: Required for QR code scannability — functional, not decorative

decisions.decision: Sidebar brand tagline 'Intelligent Restaurant OS' may stay (brand identity) — confirm with user if needed
decisions.rationale: Line 92 Sidebar.tsx — only 'System Ready' (line 127) is clearly operational UI copy needing FR

decisions.decision: MaintenancePage/DeliveryHub mock data (courier names, log messages) left as-is; only UI labels converted to FR
decisions.rationale: Hardcoded mock data is content, not UI structure

next_action: Apply Phase D French string replacements to the 6 files listed in remaining_tasks[0].files, then run `cd app/frontend/backoffice-app && npm run build` to verify TypeScript/Vite passes, commit atomically, then run CLAUDE.md sync obligations.
